productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Printed Black Tshirt
description: Composition Black round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves and graphic print on the front Fit Regular Wash care Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergent Do not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleach Dry flat in shade Warm iron Do not iron on decorations Indulge your fun side with this graphic black t-shirt from United Colours of Benetton. The vibrant graphic of the teddy bear at a tea party will bring back your memories of childhood and fairytales Team this with jeans and canvas shoes for that cool, casual look. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
